---
title: "Global Health Inequality Analysis"
author: "Ava Hu"
date: "February 2026"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

## About This Project

This project analyzes global health and economic indicators, explores statistical relationships through regression modeling, and examines U.S. Census demographics in California. Built with R using data from the WHO Global Health Observatory, California schools datasets, and the U.S. Census Bureau's American Community Survey.

## Analyses

1. **[Descriptive Analysis](01_descriptive_analysis.html)** — Summary statistics, correlations, and distributions across 222 countries
2. **[Regression Analysis](02_regression_analysis.html)** — Linear modeling of health expenditure predictors and school performance
3. **[Census Demographics](03_census_demographics.html)** — Racial composition and age patterns in California using ACS data

## Data Sources

- WHO Global Health Observatory
- California Schools Dataset
- U.S. Census Bureau, ACS 5-Year Estimates (2022–2023)

---

*Ava Hu · February 2026*
